events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the back-pitched PVC condensing flue is a **fail**, high-risk, non-compliant/installed-defective condition (condensate pooling → blockage, freeze-up, joint failure, potential CO/flue-gas leakage). Immediate control is to shut down the furnace, correct the slope to manufacturer spec (min. 1/4 in/ft toward the unit), re-support the pipe, clear condensate, verify the trap/drain, and confirm safe combustion/venting before returning to service.
